text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: You've got this, Kita! Keep that lead!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text:
Sato, you're almost there! One final<n>push! You
can do it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The crowd's really pumped up! It<n>looks like
Satono Diamond and<n>Kitasan Black are facing off
in a<n>pick-up race.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black and Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
All right! Looks like victory was mine<n>this time,
Dia!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I lost two out of our three races.<n>You've
been getting faster and faster<n>lately, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you think so?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But during that first race, you<n>completely
outpaced me to take the<n>win.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I need to improve my focus!<n>I'm gonna go
to the library and look<n>up some mental training
methods!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for racing with me today, Dia!<n>I'll catch
you later!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Sure... I'll see you later, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Right. I need to get going myself!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Later that night, noticing that the lights<n>are still on
at the gym, I drop by to<n>see what's happening.
Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: My apologies. Is it time for lights out<n>already?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
There's still a little time left. But it's<n>already very
late, and she's the only<n>one here...
choice_data_list:
You have time. But aren't you pushing yourself
too hard?

You have time. But aren't you pushing yourself
too hard?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, you're such a kind soul.<n>I'm fine,
really!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But I'm in no position to best my<n>rival... Not at this
level.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Kita was the first Umamusume to<n>make me feel
like I was actually<n>outmatched.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I always thought that I only needed to<n>focus on
what was in front of me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That if I simply kept looking ahead, I<n>could fulfill
my birthright and meet<n>everyone's expectations.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But then...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ahead of me, Kita stepped into view.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
My field of vision had always been<n>empty, and
yet there she was.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That's why I want to surpass her.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
She's straightforward, kind, and<n>powerful. I want
to do what it takes to<n>overtake her!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The sheer strength of Satono<n>Diamond's resolve
is clear. I<n>consider my options...
choice_data_list: Stay with her until lights out.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I encourage her to focus on training<n>hard and
promise to tell her when it's<n>lights out.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Really? Thank you so very much!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, I need to keep pushing<n>myself!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And then, after Satono Diamond<n>returns to her
training...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Someone's already using the leg<n>press
machine...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hngh... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...It appears as though I should call it a<n>day.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Without losing any focus whatsoever,<n>Satono
Diamond continues training for<n>a while.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After warning her not to stay out too<n>late, I let her
know that I'm leaving.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'll make sure to be mindful of<n>the time.
Thank you very much for<n>your kind
consideration!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I'm about to leave, I hear a voice<n>coming
from the racetrack. And when<n>I take a look...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Find a target to focus on... Yeah, I<n>think I'm
starting to get it!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Okay, one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see what the future<n>holds for
these two Umamusume<n>racing toward their
dreams.
